description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/motorica-org/gitlab-ci-react-native-android:master and a single stage named build. Define a build job that runs the following before_script commands: eval $(ssh-agent -s), ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY"), mkdir -p ~/.ssh, [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo "$SSH_SERVER_HOSTKEYS" > ~/.ssh/known_hosts, cd android/, git archive --remote=$SECRETS_REPO HEAD $KEYSTORE_RELPATH | tar -x, echo $GPLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT > app/gplay_service_account.json, export GRADLE_USER_HOME=$(pwd)/.gradle, chmod +x ./gradlew, cd .. . In the script section run: yarn install, cd android/, ./gradlew assembleDebug, ./gradlew assembleRelease, and ./gradlew publishApkRelease. Cache the node_modules/ and .gradle/ directories using the key ${CI_PROJECT_ID}. Publish the generated APKs as artifacts from android/app/build/outputs/apk/app-debug.apk and android/app/build/outputs/apk/app-release.apk. No special rules or deployment targets are defined.
